proxy-groups:
- name: 🚀 Select
  type: select
  proxies:
  - ♻️ Auto Select
  - DIRECT
  - V2Get🛰️ 2026-07-04 11:08
  - 'V2Get🛰️ 2026-07-04 11:08 #2'
